features: LEMON FRESH BOOST: Give the machine a bright lemon lift after every load. Pop this hanging air freshener on the top rack and enjoy that clean-kitchen feel when the door opens.
LASTS UP TO 60 WASHES: Each pack includes two dishwasher freshener units for long-lasting freshness. Perfect for busy homes where the dishwasher runs daily and you want set-and-forget freshness.
FITS ALL DISHWASHERS: Designed to sit neatly on the top rack without getting in the way of plates or pans. Handy for slimline or full-size machines at home, in flats, or holiday lets.
ODOUR CONTROL BETWEEN WASHES: Stops lingering food smells from hanging around in a damp dishwasher. Ideal after fish dinners or cheesy bakes, so the next cycle starts smell fresh, not stale.
PACK OF 2 VALUE: Keep one in the machine and one ready for the next swap. Brilliant for stocking up in the cleaning cupboard, or sharing with a friend who loves a lemon zing.
FRESHNESS YOU CAN TRUST: When the dishwasher smells nice, unloading feels less of a chore. Use it during weekly meal prep or after big Sunday roasts to keep that lemon-clean vibe going.
EASY TO REPLACE: Replace after 30 cycles or when the scent fades for best results. Useful for households with different wash programmes, so it stays reliably fresh across quick and eco cycles.
FRESH DISHWASHER FRESH KITCHEN: A fresh dishwasher can make the whole space feel cleaner. Great before guests arrive or after a weekend of cooking, when the kitchen needs a quick smell fresh reset.
FUSS-FREE DEODORISER: No powders, no sprays, no extra steps in the routine. Just clip it on and let the deodoriser do the work while the family piles in cups, lunch boxes and cutlery.
USE WITH EVERY LOAD: Works quietly in the background as a simple air freshener for the dishwasher. From baby bottles to greasy baking trays, the machine stays lemon fresh and ready to go.
description: Product Description Open the dishwasher door and get a hit of fresh lemon instead of yesterday’s dinner. Elbow Grease Dishwasher Freshener is a simple hanging air freshener designed to keep the machine smelling clean between washes. Clip the dishwasher freshener onto the top rack and let it work as an everyday deodoriser, helping to control odours while the dishwasher sits damp and closed. It’s suitable for all dishwashers and stays neatly out of the way, so plates, pans and glasses can still be stacked as normal. This 2 pack is made for real life. Each dishwasher freshener lasts up to 30 cycles, giving up to 60 washes of lemon-fresh confidence in total. That means fewer “what’s that smell?” moments and more of that just-cleaned feeling when unloading. Use it in busy family kitchens, shared flats, holiday lets or anywhere the dishwasher needs to smell fresh without extra effort. Ingredients Contains: EUCALYPTOL; CITRAL; LINALOOL. Contains amongst other ingredients: Parfum, Linalool, Citral, Geraniol. Directions * Attach freshener to top rack of the dishwasher. * Replace each freshener after 30 dishwasher cycles or when no longer fragrant. See more
